sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113284" key="xamaitupi/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χᾰμαιτῠπ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n113284.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">χαμαιτύπη</ref></xr>, rejected by <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Thom.Mag.</author> </bibl> <pb n="1976" TEIform="pb"/> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9023.tlg001:p.400R" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.400R.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
